case.title: MCCARTHY v. BUNKER HILL & SULLIVAN MINING & CONCENTRATING C

opinion.h4: MCCARTHY v. BUNKER HILL & SULLIVAN MINING & CONCENTRATING C, (1909)
opinion.h2: EX PARTE: IN THE MATTER OF THE DOWAGIAC MANUFACTURING COMPANY, Petitioner.
opinion.p: Messrs. Fred L. Chappell, Morison R. Waite, and Edmund Wetmore for petitioner.
Denied.[ McCarthy v. Bunker Hill & Sullivan Mining & Concentrating C (1909) ]
